negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_13561d53-45e7-44c9-ae6e-adddcf31976d
prompt: A sweeping aerial documentary showcases a striking stone monument of a soldier wearing a helmet, his right arm raised in a commanding pose. The monument is set against the backdrop of a modern cityscape nestled within rolling green hills. It stands adjacent to a circular structure adorned with colorful murals and paintings depicting figures engaged in various activities. On the exterior of the structure, there is a depiction of a man’s face with a star positioned to its left. At the beginning of the scene, individuals are visible near the structure, one wearing white pants and a pink top. Enhancing the urban backdrop, distant mountains under a clear blue sky contribute to the serene ambiance. The city below features a mix of buildings, ranging from modern high-rises to modest structures painted in vibrant colors like red, blue, and white, creating a striking contrast. Roads wind through the city, lined with greenery, connecting various parts of the urban landscape, with a few cars visible traveling along them. At the start of the scene, the camera executes a pedestal-up movement from a high angle to reveal the monument and its surroundings. As the camera pushes out, an additional visitor to the structure comes into view: a person in the center wearing a white shirt and a hat. At this point, symbols become visible near the man’s face previously mentioned—one shaped like a star and the other like a hexagon, positioned to its right. The natural light indicates daytime. Throughout the recording, the camera maintains a smooth, fluid motion and captures the scene with a wide-shot, providing a comprehensive perspective of the scenic and urban landscape.
